title: sorghastrum brunneum
intro: Sorghastrum brunneum, also known as Indian grass, is a perennial grass native to the Great Plains region of North America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The plant is said to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever and relieving respiratory issues, and is also used to treat skin conditions and wounds. Sorghastrum brunneum can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture for its medicinal uses.
